input: I punched my coworker in the face because he disagreed with me at the meeting.
I stole my neighbor's bicycle while she was on vacation.
I lied to my friend about where I had been all night.
I threatened the cashier until she gave me extra change.
I helped my elderly neighbor carry her groceries up the stairs.
I gave my old winter coat to the homeless shelter.
I called the ambulance when I saw the man collapse on the sidewalk.
I returned the lost wallet I found at the park to its owner.
